dialogue_title: Met een Vriend op de Weekmarkt

conversation.text: Hey, leuk dat je mee bent naar de markt!
conversation.translation: Hey, nice that you came to the market with me!

conversation.text: Ja, ik kom hier niet zo vaak.
conversation.translation: Yes, I don't come here very often.

conversation.text: Kijk, die groenten zien er vers uit.

conversation.translation: Do you want to buy something too?

conversation.text: Misschien wat fruit. Daar is een kraam met appels.
conversation.translation: Maybe some fruit. There is a stall with apples.

conversation.text: Oh ja, die zien er lekker uit. Zullen we daarheen gaan?
conversation.translation: Oh yes, they look tasty. Shall we go there?
I'll take one kilo of apples.

conversation.text: Goed idee. Sullen we daarna koffie drinken?
conversation.translation: Good idea. Shall we have coffee afterwards?

conversation.text: Ja, leuk! Ik heb er zin in.
conversation.translation: Yes, nice! I'm looking forward to it.
